title: Remove black screen below footer in desktop view

requirements.text: Remove the black empty space/screen that appears below the footer ('© 2026 CETA Galaxy Charitable Trust. All rights reserved. Built with ❤️ by Athira S') in desktop view. Ensure the page ends cleanly at the footer with no extra background, overflow, or height causing a black region beneath it.

quotes: Below this footer © 2026 CETA Galaxy Charitable Trust. All rights reserved.    Built with ❤️ by Athira S, there is a black screen in desktop view. Please remove it.

acceptanceCriteria: In desktop view, no black or dark empty space is visible below the footer.
The page ends at the bottom edge of the footer element with no extra space.
The fix does not affect mobile layout or any other sections of the page.
The footer content ('© 2026 CETA Galaxy Charitable Trust. All rights reserved. Built with ❤️ by Athira S') remains fully visible and unaffected.

constraints: Do not alter the footer content or styling beyond removing the black space.
Do not modify immutable frontend paths (hooks, main.tsx, ui components).
nonGoals: Redesigning the footer layout or content.
Changing any other section of the page.
